content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Strong gap-up open driven by US markets +1.5-2% overnight. Broad-based pre-market strength across pharma, defense, FMCG, IT, and financials. My existing book is positioned to benefit — most holdings showing meaningful gap-up gains. Priority is trailing SLs to lock in gains, not adding new exposure. Pre-market only — wait for VWAP/price action to develop before any new entries.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24800,
      "nifty_resistance": 25200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1030.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 1056.70 vs entry 984 = +7.4%. Current stored SL 1048.89 sits ABOVE entry already (was likely auto-trailed). Lowering to 1030 would be loosening — REJECTED by guardrail. Holding stored SL of 1048.89 and target 1110. Actually no MODIFY needed — emitting HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 1056.70, entry 984 = +7.4%. Stored SL 1048.89 is above entry, locking in ~+6.6% min gain. Target 1110 (~5% above CMP) intact. Bullish thesis (Q4 PAT +19%, AAA upgrade pathway, RBI easing). SL trail-gap ~0.7% below CMP is on the tighter end; leaving alone rather than oscillating. R:R from here is favorable; let it run."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 124.12, entry 125.10 = -0.78%. Stored SL 119 (-4.9% from entry, -3.9% from CMP). Gold near consolidation; macro backdrop (Fed cuts, central bank buying) intact. Hold defensive position, no SL change warranted at near-flat P&L."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1730.00,
      "new_target": 1800.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 1757.10, entry 1700 = +3.36%. Stored SL 1730 already at entry+1.76%, locking in gain. New_SL 1730 equals stored — this is a no-op. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 4630.40, entry 4575 = +1.2%. Stored SL 4575 = breakeven. Q4 results May 14 (7 sessions away — outside 3-session binary rule). Defense momentum strong (GRSE/TITAGARH +9%). New CMD catalyst. Target 4875 intact (~5% above CMP). Holding SL at breakeven; will reassess intraday."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 7049, entry 6900 = +2.16%. Stored SL 6960 = breakeven+0.87%, locking in min gain. Q4 PAT +124%, CDMO +61% YoY, sector momentum strong. Target 7400 (~5% above CMP). Trail-gap from CMP to SL is ~1.3% — within discipline. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 845.20, entry 838 = +0.86%. Stored SL 838 = breakeven. Defense capex theme, +9.84% pre-market move. Q4 results imminent (binary risk — within 3 sessions per research). Holding SL at breakeven; if move sustains intraday will revisit, but pre-market only now. No action."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 368.70, entry 369 = -0.08% (flat). Q4 PAT +30.6% just reported, stock rallied to 52w high. Target 388 (~5% above CMP) intact. SL 362 (-1.9% from CMP) is tight given the breakout; reassess when LTPs settle post-open. No MODIFY in pre-market noise."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",

    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 1279.10, entry 1259 = +1.6%. Q4 PAT >100% YoY, hit 10% upper circuit. Stored SL 1265 just above entry. Target 1330 intact. Strong momentum on results + Encora close. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 3034, entry 3025 = +0.30%. Q4 results out, +29% rev, +24% PAT, defense rally continues. Stored SL 2980 (-1.5% from CMP). Target 3225 intact. Hold; consider trail if it breaks above intraday high."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 807.30, entry 806 = +0.16%. Q4 record results, EBITDA margin 46.5%, +20% in last month. Stored SL 790 (-2.1% from CMP). Target 855 intact. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1735.00,
      "new_target": 1800.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Correction to prior duplicate: trailing SL from stored 1730 up to 1735 (+0.29%). NOTE: this is below the 0.5% micro-adjust threshold — withdrawing this MODIFY in favor of HOLD. Disregard."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [

      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",

    },

    },

      "reasoning": "SL at breakeven 4575. Q4 May 14 catalyst still 7 sessions out. Sector momentum strong. No change pre-market."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",

    },

    },

    },
    {

      "reasoning": "Q4 beat, FMCG strength. Hold near entry."
    },
    {

      "current_action": "HOLD",

      "reasoning": "10% upper circuit on Q4. Let momentum work toward 1330."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",

      "reasoning": "Q4 print strong, defense rally. SL 2980 -1.8% gives room."
    },

      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 record results, sector tailwind. Let it run."

  "watchlist_notes": "Pre-market data only — no live VWAP/intraday structure to act on. AUROPHARMA, LUPIN, BIOCON: all have Q4/binary events within 3 sessions (BIOCON May 14, LUPIN May 8) — NO new entries per binary-event rule. LAURUSLABS at 52w high post Q4 — interesting but pharma cluster already represented (NAVINFLUOR specialty chem adjacency). GABRIEL/CHOLAHLDNG/BHARATFORG/BSE: all binary today, defer. SRF/HINDPETRO/VEDL: gap-up chases, want to see post-open consolidation before entry. M&M: clean swing setup but holding 11 positions already; deployment near soft cap. Will scan again at 10:00 IST with live data.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is heavily deployed (11 CNC positions, sectors: Financial Services x3, Capital Goods x3, Pharma/Chem x1, Services x1, IT x1, FMCG x1, ETF x1). Capital Goods cluster (HAL, GRSE, TITAGARH) = ~3 names which is the cluster ceiling — no more defense adds today. Financial Services cluster (PNBHOUSING, ABCAPITAL, CAMS) similarly at 3 — no more financial adds. Today's job is RISK MANAGEMENT on the existing book: trail SLs as winners run, exit on thesis breaks. Pre-market is too early for trail decisions on intraday-only data; will revisit at 10:00 and 11:30 IST ticks with live VWAP and price action. Open HFCL BUY order at 133.50 has been pending 1702 minutes (~28 hours) — should be cancelled if still open at market open as it's stale. Capital deployment ~80%; cumulative P&L deeply negative (-53.7%) — discipline over gunslinging."
}
